description: Per-EA graduation config for Quinn. Lanes listed in autonomousLanes are graduated to autonomous-send. EMPTY by default — drafts-only is preserved until the operator deliberately graduates a lane.
notes: Quinn's graduation set is independent from Alex's — Sarah graduates her own categories at her own pace.
Same advisory as the Jeff-side config: 'autonomous' is the only sensible first graduation candidate. 'approval' and 'principal_only' should never appear here.
